2312920.name: The Longest Dungeon
2312920.description:
The Longest Dungeon is a story-less game in which you play as a character stuck in the dungeon. You fight enemies with your 2 moves, Explosive Dash, and a sword. You also might gain an ability at the start of each run. You fight off enemies in a procedurally selected dungeon. The Longest Dungeon is made for replayability with no story and different dungeons each time. Receive upgrades from killing bosses and gain health from killing basic enemies. It has a simple pixel art style while incorporating a cartoony animation style.

Abilities Include:

  • Slow Time: Slow down the world around you and speed yourself up.

  • The Stun Shield: Summon a shield to protect you.

  • Health Regenerate: Have the chance to regenerate one health every few seconds

  • (UPDATED)The Ring: Start an AOE attack that damages enemies around you.

  • Hydra Spit: Create a larger version of the Hydra's spit and throw it at enemies.
2312920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
